approaches.title: Iterative Reverse Traversal
approaches.summary: Count characters from the end until a space is encountered after non-space characters.

revisions.shortChangeSummary: Initial solution using manual reverse traversal and counting.

approaches.title: Iterator Chain with Trim
approaches.summary: Use Rust's iterator methods to trim trailing spaces and count characters until the first space.

revisions.shortChangeSummary: Refactored to use iterator chain with trim_end and take_while.
